assertions.assertion: Sets EncryptAssertions = true on the SamlServiceProvider
Populates EncryptionCertificates with a certificate loaded from certs/sp-encryption.cer
assertions.rationale: X509Certificate2 loaded from 'certs/sp-encryption.cer' and added to EncryptionCertificates.

assertions.assertion: Sets AllowIdpInitiated = true on the SamlServiceProvider
Mentions that the IdP-initiated SSO endpoint must be enabled via options.Endpoints.EnableSamlIdpInitiatedSsoEndpoint = true
assertions.rationale: options.Endpoints.EnableSamlIdpInitiatedSsoEndpoint = true is shown in code with explanation.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT set EncryptAssertions = true without providing EncryptionCertificates
assertions.rationale: EncryptionCertificates is populated alongside EncryptAssertions = true.
